title: Hearts of Power
description: Battle for survival in a heart-based PvP world where death is permanent
body:
**⚔️ What is Hearts of Power?**

Hearts of Power is a competitive PvP-focused Minecraft mod where your hearts are your most valuable resource. Lose them in battle, and you face permanent consequences — even bans. Craft powerful Special Hearts, manage limited daily playtime, and survive in a brutal, customizable combat environment. With a unique heart-based system and full admin control, every decision matters.

**🔥 Core Features**

🧡 Start with 3 blue hearts

💀 PvP death = permanent heart loss

⛔ Combat logging = instant heart penalty

🛠️ Craft new hearts using the Heart Crafting Table

🔒 Unique Special Hearts – one-time craftable per player

⏱️ Configurable 60-minute daily playtime limit (banned after timeout)

📍 Randomized spawn system with up to 6 set locations

🏆 Heart Chain XP events with in-game rewards

⚙️ Fully controllable through powerful admin commands

**⚠️ Language Notice**

🛠️ Commands & Item Descriptions → English
💬 Main Chat Messages & System Events → German
